_note: Per-page render budget overrides. Set ONLY when a page is legitimately heavy. Each override is a debt — review monthly to see if the page can be trimmed back to global budget. 2026-05-26: budgets captured honestly to lock the ratchet at 0 breaches; trim plan in PLATFORM_ROADMAP.md item F.5.

engineering-design.html._reason: Heavy SVG drawing standards renderer + symbol library inline. Trim plan: extract drawing-symbols.js into a separately-loaded module.

engineering-design-test.html._reason: Test variant of engineering-design.html — same heavy renderer. Should be retired once main page is split.

logbook.html._reason: Logbook is the highest-engagement page; renderer is intentionally rich. Trim plan: extract sentence-builder logic into a separate module.

index.html._reason: Marketing + landing fold + onboarding combined. Trim plan: lazy-load onboarding flow.

hive.html._reason: Dashboard with 12+ KPI tiles + adoption card + role-gated supervisor block. Trim plan: lazy-load supervisor block when role is worker.

asset-hub.html._reason: Asset graph + timeline + similar-failures panel. Trim plan: extract graph-rendering into a separate module.

project-manager.html._reason: Multi-phase project view with change-order panel. Acceptable.

marketplace.html._reason: Listings + filters + Stripe-link panel inline. Acceptable for first marketplace iteration.

analytics.html._reason: OEE + MTBF + Pareto charts inline. Trim plan: extract Recharts integration once shared chart lib lands.

resume.html._reason: JSON-Resume builder: upload->AI-extract->editable-checklist editor + TRUE-OOXML .docx export (JSZip) + cover-letter draft + map-reduce client logic. Grew over the 06-03..06-06 sweeps. Trim plan: extract the .docx/JSZip writer + the taxonomy matcher into separately-loaded modules (PLATFORM_ROADMAP F.5).
